arest.description: AREST engine — FORML2 readings → REST API. Exposes create/apply/compile/audit tools for domain modeling, constraint validation, and self-modification.

arest-tutor.description: AREST with the full arest-tutor domain bundle loaded (catalog, orders, tasks, content, scheduling, notifications). Use this to exercise every framework feature from Claude.

arest-remote.description: AREST engine (remote worker mode). Requires AREST_URL and AREST_API_KEY set in your shell.
